strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React (used in multiple roles)
Strong background in relational databases (SQL, MySQL) and cloud infrastructure (AWS, Kubernetes)
Proven track record of building scalable platforms and integrating diverse data sources
concerns: Overqualified for junior/mid-level role (10+ years of senior experience, including staff roles)
Current career gap (Oct 2025 - Present) with no clear explanation in resume
Primary experience in domains (direct mail, investment, GIS) not directly aligned with renewable energy/construction tech
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical skills in the required stack (TypeScript, React, databases) and has substantial fullstack experience, but his senior-level background and unexplained career gap may create misalignment with the junior/mid-level role's expectations and on-site work environment requirements.
